name: Which City Should You Live In?
description: Discover the urban environment that best matches your personality and lifestyle

cosmopolitan.title: The Cosmopolitan
cosmopolitan.description: You thrive in vibrant, global cities that offer endless cultural experiences, diverse populations, and round-the-clock energy. Large metropolitan areas with world-class amenities and international connections suit your dynamic personality perfectly.
characteristics: Enjoys cultural diversity and international connections
Appreciates fine dining and high-end shopping
Likes being at the center of innovation and trends
cosmopolitan.challenges: May feel overwhelmed by constant stimulation or miss nature connections

creative.title: The Artistic Soul
creative.description: You belong in cities with thriving arts scenes, creative communities, and unconventional energy. Places that celebrate individuality, support the arts, and maintain a balance between urban energy and quirky charm will make you feel most at home.
characteristics: Values artistic expression and creative communities
Appreciates local character over chain establishments
Enjoys street art, live music, and indie culture
creative.strengths: Creativity, individuality, appreciation for arts, community building
creative.challenges: May struggle with overly commercialized or conservative environments

outdoorsy.title: The Nature-Urban Hybrid
outdoorsy.description: You need a city that offers easy access to nature while still providing urban amenities. Places with abundant parks, outdoor recreation, and environmental consciousness will satisfy your dual need for city life and natural connection.
characteristics: Prioritizes access to nature and outdoor activities
Enjoys farmer's markets and local food scenes
Seeks work-life balance and healthy living
outdoorsy.strengths: Environmental consciousness, active lifestyle, balance-seeking, health awareness
outdoorsy.challenges: May feel constrained in dense urban environments without green spaces

traditional.title: The Classic Urbanite
traditional.description: You appreciate cities with rich history, established institutions, and traditional charm. Places that maintain their heritage while offering modern comforts provide the perfect blend of stability and sophistication for your personality.
traditional.strengths: Appreciation for history, cultural depth, consistency, refinement
traditional.challenges: May resist rapid change or overly modern environments

questions.question: Your ideal Saturday involves:
options: Brunch at a trendy spot, then high-end shopping
Exploring a new art exhibit or indie music venue
Hiking nearby trails or biking through parks
Visiting a museum or historical landmark

questions.question: What's most important in your neighborhood?
options: Proximity to business districts and luxury amenities
Local art galleries and unique small businesses
Parks and access to outdoor recreation
Historical character and established community

questions.question: What's your ideal vacation destination?
options: A bustling city with cultural landmarks
A quaint town with local art scenes
A scenic countryside retreat with nature trails
A historic city with centuries-old traditions

questions.question: What type of cuisine do you prefer for a special dinner?
options: Modern fusion with innovative presentations
Classic gourmet dishes with a twist
Comfort food with a hearty home-cooked feel
Traditional recipes passed down through generations

questions.question: Which type of music event appeals to you the most?
options: A large international music festival with multiple genres
An indie concert in a small, intimate venue
An outdoor summer music event in a park
A classical music performance in a historic theater

questions.question: How do you prefer to spend your evenings?
options: Dining at a chic, trendy restaurant in the city
Attending a live performance or art show
Hosting a casual barbecue with friends outdoors
Enjoying a quiet night at home with a classic film

questions.question: What's your preferred method of relaxation?
options: Getting a spa treatment in a luxury setting
Creating art or writing in a cozy studio
Taking a long walk in nature or going for a hike
Reading a book in a quiet, traditional library

questions.question: How do you choose what to wear on a special occasion?
options: I opt for modern, trendsetting outfits that stand out
I love quirky, creative styles that express my individuality
I choose comfortable yet stylish pieces suitable for outdoor events
I lean towards classic, timeless attire

questions.question: Which activity best reflects your weekend leisure pursuit?
options: Exploring the latest upscale dining spots in the city
Attending art exhibitions or creative workshops
Spending the day camping, hiking, or exploring nature
Participating in community events with historical significance
